data.title: The Star Entertainment Group Releases 1HFY25 Financial Results
data.description:
An announcement from Star Entertainment Group Limited ( (AU:SGR) ) is now available.

The Star Entertainment Group Limited has released its financial results for the half-year ending December 31, 2024. A briefing for investors and analysts will be conducted by the company’s CEO and CFO to discuss these results. This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s financial health and strategic direction.

More about Star Entertainment Group Limited

The Star Entertainment Group Limited operates in the entertainment and hospitality industry, focusing on providing casino and resort experiences. The company is known for its integrated resorts and gaming services, catering to both domestic and international markets.

data.title: Poonawalla Fincorp Expands with New Gold Loan Business
data.description:
Poonawalla Fincorp Limited ( (IN:POONAWALLA) ) has shared an update.

Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has launched a Gold Loan Business, expanding its secured lending portfolio. This initiative aims to provide fast, secure, and transparent financing solutions for various financial needs, with quick approvals and flexible repayment options. The company plans to open 400 new branches in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities over the next year to strengthen its market presence. The gold loan market in India is poised for significant growth, and Poonawalla Fincorp is strategically positioned to capture this opportunity by focusing on customer-centric services and premium offerings.

More about Poonawalla Fincorp Limited

Poonawalla Fincorp Limited, part of the Cyrus Poonawalla Group, is a non-banking financial company (NBFC) focused on consumer and MSME lending. The company offers a range of secured lending products and aims to expand its presence in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities.

YTD Price Performance: 16.64%

Average Trading Volume: 113,905

Current Market Cap: 285B INR

data.title: Mineral Commodities Ltd Issues 240 Million Options in Strategic Move
data.description:
Mineral Commodities Ltd ( (AU:MRC) ) has provided an update.

Mineral Commodities Ltd announced the issuance of 240,000,000 options, each exercisable at $0.015 and expiring on April 9, 2028. This issuance is part of previously announced transactions and is not intended to be quoted on the ASX, potentially impacting the company’s financial strategy and stakeholder interests.

More about Mineral Commodities Ltd

Mineral Commodities Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and production of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in the development and management of mining projects, with a market focus on unquoted equity securities.

data.title: Devonian Health Group Faces Cease Trade Order Amid Filing Delays
data.description:
An update from Devonian Health Group, Inc. ( (TSE:GSD) ) is now available.

Devonian Health Group Inc. has been issued a cease trade order by the Autorité des Marchés Financiers due to a delay in filing their interim financial statements for the fiscal period ending January 31, 2025. This order prohibits trading of the company’s securities in Canada and will remain until the required filings are submitted and the order is revoked. Despite the trading suspension, Devonian intends to continue its operations and fulfill commercial obligations while seeking to resolve the issue promptly.

More about Devonian Health Group, Inc.

Devonian Health Group Inc. is a clinical stage pharmaceutical company specializing in the development of drugs for autoimmune inflammatory conditions, utilizing novel therapeutic approaches to address unmet medical needs. The company focuses on developing prescription drugs for diseases like ulcerative colitis and atopic dermatitis, supported by FDA guidelines favoring efficient drug development for botanical products. Additionally, Devonian is involved in cosmeceutical product development and owns Altius Healthcare Group L.P., a subsidiary focused on selling licensed prescription pharmaceutical products in Canada.

YTD Price Performance: 12.50%

Average Trading Volume: 21,014

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$26.68M

data.title: MedAdvisor Extends Share Purchase Plan Deadline
data.description:
MedAdvisor Limited ( (AU:MDR) ) has shared an announcement.

MedAdvisor Limited has announced an extension of its Share Purchase Plan (SPP) deadline from April 17 to April 30, 2025, to provide eligible shareholders additional time to participate. This extension reflects the company’s commitment to engaging its stakeholders and potentially increasing shareholder participation, which may impact its financial strategy and market positioning.

More about MedAdvisor Limited

MedAdvisor Solutions (ASX: MDR) is a global leader in pharmacy-driven patient engagement solutions, offering personalized patient experiences to simplify the medication journey. Utilizing THRiV, a cloud-based, AI-enabled platform, the company enhances pharmacy workflow and patient engagement. MedAdvisor collaborates with over 34,000 pharmacies in the US, reaching more than two-thirds of the population, and is used by over 95% of Australian pharmacies, connecting with over 3.7 million patients.

data.title: Tempest Minerals Ends Agreement with Cambrian, Explores New Fundraising Options
data.description:
Tempest Minerals Limited ( (AU:TEM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tempest Minerals Ltd announced the termination of its binding agreement with Cambrian Limited and will not proceed with the proposed placement mentioned earlier this month. The company is exploring alternative fundraising options and will provide updates to the market when feasible, indicating a shift in its strategic financial planning.

More about Tempest Minerals Limited

Tempest Minerals Ltd is an Australian mineral exploration company with a diverse portfolio of projects in Western Australia, focusing on precious, base, and energy metals. The company is led by an experienced team with a track record of exploration and corporate success, aiming to maximize shareholder value through strategic exploration and development.

data.title: Stanmore Resources Limited Releases 2024 Annual Report
data.description:
Stanmore Resources Ltd ( (AU:SMR) ) has provided an update.

Stanmore Resources Limited has released its 2024 annual report, detailing its operations and financial performance. The report highlights the company’s strategic focus on efficient mining operations and development opportunities within Queensland’s coal-rich regions. This positions Stanmore Resources as a significant player in the metallurgical coal market, potentially impacting stakeholders by reinforcing its market presence and commitment to shareholder value.

More about Stanmore Resources Ltd

Stanmore Resources Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on metallurgical coal production. The company manages several coal mines including Isaac Plains Complex, South Walker Creek, and Poitrel in Queensland’s Bowen Basin, and holds additional coal tenements in Queensland’s Bowen and Surat Basins. Stanmore Resources aims to enhance shareholder value through efficient mining operations and exploring development opportunities.

data.title: Alliance Aviation Announces Registry Office Relocation
data.description:
Alliance Aviation Services Limited ( (AU:AQZ) ) has provided an announcement.

Alliance Aviation Services Limited has announced a change in the address of its registry office, MUFG Corporate Markets IR Pty Ltd, effective from April 14, 2025. The new location is at Liberty Place, Level 41, 161 Castlereagh Street, Sydney, NSW 2000. This change reflects the company’s ongoing administrative updates and is unlikely to impact its operational performance or stakeholder relations.

More about Alliance Aviation Services Limited

Alliance Aviation Services Limited is a leading provider in Australasia of contract, charter, and allied aviation and maintenance services, employing over 1,400 staff. The company serves the mining, energy, and government sectors, and offers wet lease services to other airlines. Alliance also engages in aircraft, engine, and spare parts trading. It holds prestigious certifications such as IATA’s IOSA and Flight Safety Foundation’s BARS Gold status. The company owns its fleet, which includes Fokker 70/100 and Embraer E190 aircraft, and operates bases in several Australian cities.
